/**
 * A Spatial4j Shape wrapping a {@link GeoShape} ("Geo3D") -- a 3D planar geometry based Spatial4j Shape implementation.
 * Geo3D implements shapes on the surface of a sphere or ellipsoid.
 *
 * @lucene.experimental
 */
